params.description: Small vertical picture graph appears on left side of screen. Scale of 5. Three categories shown as iconic visual reminder.
Small equal groups visual appears on right side of screen. 3 bags with 5 items each shown as iconic visual reminder.

beats.text: Here's something to think about. Today's work connects to something you've been doing for a while. Did you notice a connection?

options: Yes — reading graph scales was like finding equal groups
Kind of — some parts felt similar
Not really — this felt brand new

condition.selected: Yes — reading graph scales was like finding equal groups

validator.description: Student selected option A: recognized the connection between graph scales and equal groups

beats.text: You spotted it. Every time you read a scale-of-5 graph, you were counting groups of 5. Graph scales were equal groups the whole time.

condition.selected: Kind of — some parts felt similar

validator.description: Student selected option B: partially recognized connection

beats.text: Good noticing. The counting-by-5s and counting-by-2s from graphs — that was groups all along. The connection gets clearer over time.

condition.selected: Not really — this felt brand new

validator.description: Student selected option C: did not recognize connection

beats.text: That makes sense — the × symbol and 'equal groups' are new. But remember the Warmup graph? Those symbols were holding groups inside. You'll see more connections as we keep going.

elements.description: Small vertical picture graph on left side. Scale of 5. Three categories. Iconic reminder of graph work.
Small equal groups visual on right side. 3 bags with 5 items each. Iconic reminder of equal groups work.
